scripts.datasets:medium: cross-env TOOL_PAGE_LIMIT=10000 COMPARE_PAGE_LIMIT=5000 ALT_PAGE_LIMIT=10000 node scripts/build-seo-datasets.mjs
scripts.datasets:full: cross-env TOOL_PAGE_LIMIT=19088 COMPARE_PAGE_LIMIT=10000 ALT_PAGE_LIMIT=19088 node scripts/build-seo-datasets.mjs
scripts.pipeline: node scripts/inject-canonical-tools.mjs && node scripts/build-seo-datasets.mjs && node scripts/build-authority-datasets.mjs
scripts.pipeline:medium: node scripts/inject-canonical-tools.mjs && npm run datasets:medium && node scripts/build-authority-datasets.mjs
scripts.pipeline:full: node scripts/inject-canonical-tools.mjs && npm run datasets:full && node scripts/build-authority-datasets.mjs
